channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in HTML (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in HTML nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 VoltAgent/awesome-design-md (16336 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: VoltAgent

📝 Repository: VoltAgent/awesome-design-md

📄 Descrizione: Collection of DESIGN.md files that capture design systems from popular websites. Drop one into your project and let coding agents build matching UI.

⭐ Stelle: 16336

🍴 Forks: 2016

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: awesome-list design-md design-system design-tokens figma google-stitch landing-page

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T16:37:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-06T04:39:13Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI (6119 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ringhyacinth

📝 Repository: ringhyacinth/Star-Office-UI

📄 Descrizione: A pixel office for your OpenClaw: turn invisible work states into a cozy little space with characters, daily notes, and guest agents. Code under MIT; art assets for non-commercial learning only.

⭐ Stelle: 6119

🍴 Forks: 656

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: agent-collaboration ai-assistant dashboard flask mobile-friendly multi-agent openclaw phaser pixel-art status-visiualzation

📜 Licenza: Other

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-27T04:27:51Z

]]>
